article.title: The Pope’s Warnings About AI Were AI-Generated, a Detection Tool Claims
article.summary: Pangram Labs’ updated Chrome extension puts warning labels on AI slop as you scroll your social feeds.
article.title_zh: 教宗關於 AI 的警告是由 AI 生成的，檢測工具聲稱
article.summary_zh: Pangram Labs 更新的 Chrome 擴充程式在您滾動社群媒體源時標記 AI 垃圾內容。

article.title: Report: Meta will train AI agents by tracking employees' mouse, keyboard use
article.summary: Meta will begin tracking the mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes of its US employees to generate high-quality training data for future AI agents, Reuters reports . The news organization cites internal memos posted by the Meta Superintelligence Labs team in reporting on the new Model Capability Initiative employee-tracking software. That software will operate on specific work-related apps and websites and also make use of periodic screenshots to provide context for the AI training, according to the memo. "This is where all Meta employees can help our models get better simply by doing their daily work," the memo reads, in part, Reuters reports. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: 報告：Meta將透過追蹤員工的滑鼠和鍵盤使用情況來訓練AI代理
article.summary_zh: 據路透社報導，Meta將開始追蹤其美國員工的滑鼠移動、點擊和按鍵操作，以生成用於未來AI代理的高品質訓練數據。Meta Superintelligence Labs團隊發佈的內部備忘錄報導了這一新的Model Capability Initiative。

article.title: Framework’s overhauled Laptop 13 Pro brings a redesigned chassis — Intel Core Ultra Series 3 system aims to be a 'MacBook Pro for Linux users'
article.summary: The Framework Laptop 13 Pro is the company's first redesign of its chassis, with CNC aluminum, a haptic touchpad, larger battery, and an option for pre-loaded Ubuntu.
article.title_zh: Framework 重新設計的 Laptop 13 Pro 搭載 Intel Core Ultra Series 3——瞄準成為『Linux 用戶的 MacBook Pro』
article.summary_zh: Framework Laptop 13 Pro 是該公司首次重新設計機殼，採用 CNC 鋁合金、觸覺觸控板、更大電池，並提供預裝 Ubuntu 選項。

article.title: AI research lab NeoCognition lands $40M seed to build agents that learn like humans
article.summary: Founded by an OSU researcher, the startup is developing AI agents that can become experts in any domain.
article.title_zh: AI 研究實驗室 NeoCognition 獲得 4000 萬美元種子輪融資，開發像人類一樣學習的智能代理
article.summary_zh: 由俄亥俄州立大學研究人員創辦的初創公司正在開發能在任何領域成為專家的 AI 代理。

article.title: Bond, a new social media platform, wants to use AI to help you kick your doomscrolling habit
article.summary: Bond wants you to get off the couch and get back into the real world, its creator says. The new platform's AI system is designed to motivate users to do things away from the app.
article.title_zh: 新社交媒體平台 Bond 想用 AI 幫助您戒除無限滾動的習慣
article.summary_zh: Bond 的創造者表示，該平台想讓用戶遠離沙發，回到現實世界，其 AI 系統旨在激勵用戶進行應用程式外的活動。

article.title: Google Cloud Debuts New AI Chips, Tools for Building Agents
article.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google Cloud division unveiled the latest generation of its tensor processing unit, or TPU, a homegrown chip that’s designed to make AI computing services faster and more efficient.
article.title_zh: Google Cloud 推出新 AI 芯片和 Agent 開發工具
article.summary_zh: Alphabet 旗下 Google Cloud 部門推出了最新一代 TPU（張量處理單元），這是一款自主開發的芯片，旨在加快 AI 運算服務的速度並提高效率。

article.title: OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Images 2 image-gen model capable of magazine design
article.summary: OpenAI is announcing its upgraded ChatGPT image generation model with ChatGPT Images 2. The company is also scaling up Codex for enterprise with a new Codex Labs initiative. more…
article.title_zh: OpenAI推出ChatGPT Images 2圖像生成模型，可用於雜誌設計
article.summary_zh: OpenAI推出升級版ChatGPT圖像生成模型ChatGPT Images 2，並推出新的Codex Labs企業計劃。

article.title: Adobe Expands Agentic AI Ecosystem With Big Tech Partners
article.summary: Adobe is launching a new agentic platform targeting business-to-business and consumers that, in addition to working closely with model providers OpenAI and Anthropic, can ease concern about disruption to its business. The company is partnering with tech giants Amazon, Anthropic, Google, Nvidia, OpenAI, and more to build what it calls the broadest agentic AI ecosystem in the industry. Anil Chakravarthy, Adobe Customer Experience Orchestration Business President, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily from the Adobe Summit 2026 in Las Vegas to discuss. He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Adobe與大型科技公司夥伴擴展代理AI生態系統
article.summary_zh: Adobe推出新的代理平台，針對企業對企業和消費者市場，與OpenAI和Anthropic等模型提供商密切合作，可緩解對業務中斷的擔憂，並與Amazon、Anthropic、Google、Nvidia等科技巨頭合作。

article.title: Alienware Area-51 gaming desktop now available with AMD’s flagship Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition — top CPU config starts at $4,449.99 with RTX 5070 and 32GB DDR5
article.summary: Alienware is the first to launch a system powered by AMD’s Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition, combining the new flagship CPU with high-end components.
article.title_zh: Alienware Area-51 遊戲桌面現已支援 AMD 旗艦 Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition——頂級 CPU 配置起價 $4,449.99，配備 RTX 5070 和 32GB DDR5
article.summary_zh: Alienware 是首家推出搭載 AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition 的系統的廠商，將新旗艦 CPU 與高階元件相結合。

article.title: Anker raises the bar for on-device AI with a hugely optimized chip for earbuds
article.summary: TL;DR Anker is introducing its Thus chip for on-device AI. Thus utilizes a compute-in-memory architecture to minimize power requirements. The first Thus-powered earbuds will debut next month, but Anker plans to get Thus into a whole lot more products. To listen to some of the most vocal AI proponents, these systems are going to solve every problem known to man and usher in a new utopian age. While the reality is a bit less transformative, there’s no denying that AI is capable of some remarkable feats — when we throw sufficient processing power behind it , anyway. But now Anker is trying to show us that even devices with limited resources can get it on the benefits, as it introduces its new AI chip solution. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: Anker 透過為耳塞高度最佳化的晶片提升裝置端 AI 的標準
article.summary_zh: Anker 推出用於裝置端 AI 的 Thus 晶片，利用計算記憶體架構最小化功耗需求。首款 Thus 耳塞將於下月推出，但 Anker 計畫將 Thus 整合到更多產品中。

article.title: Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models
article.summary: Meta says that it has a new internal tool that is converting mouse movements and button clicks into data that can train its AI models.
article.title_zh: Meta 將記錄員工的按鍵操作並用其訓練 AI 模型
article.summary_zh: Meta 表示已開發新的內部工具，可將滑鼠移動和按鈕點擊轉換為可訓練 AI 模型的數據。
